历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 63957 → 54612 → 51687 → 50295 → 58100. From 2021 to 2024, the ranking continuously moved forward (ranking number decreased), but in 2025, there was a significant rebound, moving backward by about 7805 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 58100. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province was 18 students in 2021, 20 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 16 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 17 students, a slight increase of 1 student (+6.25%) compared to 2025, with a slight increase in slots and a slight easing of competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking was approximately 195th in 2025, and it did not enter the top 200 in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years, placing it in the middle-to-lower segment of national universities. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 30th (relatively popular), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.38 million, indicating some exposure on short video platforms. There are no significant negative or positive events recorded in reputation documents, and public opinion is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Tibet University has no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating weak overall disciplinary strength and limited appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are highly popular and recommended, partially overlapping with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Transportation, Civil Engineering, etc.). In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province is about 252,000, roughly the same as in 2025. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 426 points in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, far from Hubei Province, and regional preferences may somewhat suppress the willingness of Hubei candidates to apply. The university enrolls very few students in Hubei Province (only 17 in 2026), making it a niche choice in cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound in rankings in 2025, the slight expansion in 2026, and the roughly stable number of candidates; given the large rebound in 2025 and the limited expansion in 2026, the actual ranking may be slightly lower. The predicted minimum ranking is about 59779, with a range of 59279–60279.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 59279–60279, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<59279), you can focus on aiming for popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Communication Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>60279), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 safety majors.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预测2026年西藏大学医学类（护理学）最低录取位次约为36860位，较2025年大幅前移约21240位，反映招生计划大幅缩减带来的竞争加剧。 预计录取区间在36360至37360位之间，建议考生结合自身位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Tibet University's medical programs in Hubei Province over the past five years have fluctuated significantly: 63,957th in 2021 (plan: 4 students), 51,687th in 2023 (plan: 4 students), 50,295th in 2024 (plan: 4 students), and 58,100th in 2025 (plan: 3 students). Overall, it shows a pattern of first rising, then falling, then rising again, with the 2025 ranking dropping about 7,800 places compared to 2024. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is drastically reduced to only 1 student (Nursing), with the Clinical Medicine program canceled, representing a 66.7% reduction in the plan, significantly tightening supply and demand.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a key national university under the 211 Project, selected as a Double First-Class construction university, and is the only comprehensive university in the Tibet Autonomous Region. As a key university in the border region, it has a certain regional influence in the field of medical education, but due to objective factors such as remote geographical location and high altitude, its appeal to Hubei Province candidates is relatively limited, and overall application enthusiasm is at a medium-to-low level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs nationwide continue to maintain high application enthusiasm, with Clinical Medicine being particularly prominent. However, in 2026, Tibet University is only offering 1 enrollment spot for Nursing in Hubei Province, with Clinical Medicine canceled. The application enthusiasm for Nursing is generally lower than that for Clinical Medicine, and Tibet University is located in Lhasa, far from Hubei Province, with geographical factors having a certain inhibitory effect on candidate choices. The local medical enrollment scale is extremely small (only 1 student), leading to high competition concentration.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Tibet University's medical program (Nursing) in 2026 is approximately 36,860th, a significant advance of about 21,240 places compared to 2025, reflecting intensified competition due to the drastic reduction in enrollment plans. The expected admission range is between 36,360th and 37,360th, and it is recommended that candidates position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Tibet University is only enrolling 1 student in the Nursing program (1 spot) for medical programs in Hubei Province. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range can actively apply. Clinical Medicine has not been offered in Hubei in recent years; if it resumes enrollment, it would be a reach tier. It is recommended to focus on Nursing as the main target, and those with higher rankings may consider Clinical Medicine programs at other institutions.
